name: pi-notes
description: Operate pi-notes Brain review surfaces, data-backed notes, and multi-harness local review workflows in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use pi-notes Brain review workflows in Codex.
interface.longDescription: pi-notes packages local Brain review documents, data-backed MDSvX notes, diagram helpers, and harness-specific guidance. The Codex plugin is skill-first today; active browser-to-agent feedback remains adapter-specific.
defaultPrompt: Open the pi-notes Brain review surface for this repo.
Check and improve this repo's .brain notes.
Create a data-backed pi-notes Brain review page.
